cards.text: The tangent to a circle is perpendicular to the radius through the point of contact.
Tangent to a circle: A line that touches the circle at a single point is known as a tangent to a circle.

flash_cards.topic_name: Number of Tangents from a Point on a Circle (X-10.2)

cards.text: The lengths of the two tangents from an external point to a circle are equal.
cards.topic_name: Number of Tangents from a Point on a Circle (X-10.2)
